title: primula elatior subsp. lofthousei
intro: Primula elatior subsp. lofthousei, also known as Lofthouse's cowslip, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the primrose family. It is a perennial plant native to the British Isles and is often used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. Primula elatior subsp. lofthousei contains flavonoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, providing relief from respiratory issues and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its health benefits and is often used to soothe coughs, colds, and other respiratory problems.
